export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form fields, and writes them to an XML file using a custom root element name required by an external system.

add-calculated-total-field-javascript.title: Add Calculated Total Field Using JavaScript
add-calculated-total-field-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to create numeric form fields in a PDF and add a calculated field that sums them using JavaScript, with automatic recalculation enabled.

add-current-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Current Time Field to PDF on Load
add-current-time-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a DateField in a PDF, set its display format to HH:mm:ss, assign the current system time as the default value, and save the modified document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.description: Shows how to add a barcode form field to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the resulting form.

create-dynamic-barcode-field.title: Create Dynamic Barcode Field in PDF
create-dynamic-barcode-field.description: Shows how to generate a unique barcode value at runtime and add it as a read‑only BarcodeField to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-pdf-form-field-count.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count Before Processing
verify-pdf-form-field-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, check the number of form fields using Document.Form.Count, and only process the document when the expected field count is present.

create-pdf-with-acroform-textbox-and-mar.title: Create PDF with AcroForm TextBox and Page Margins
create-pdf-with-acroform-textbox-and-mar.description: Demonstrates how to set page margins and add an AcroForm text box field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

load-pdf-with-formeditor-and-save-modifi.title: Load PDF with FormEditor and Save Modified Output
load-pdf-with-formeditor-and-save-modifi.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor, optionally modifying form fields, and saving the result to a new file.

set-character-limit-on-pdf-form-field.title: Set Character Limit on PDF Form Field
set-character-limit-on-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor to set a 50‑character limit on the 'CustomerName' form field in an existing PDF document.

retrieve-character-limit-of-pdf-form-fie.title: Retrieve Character Limit of a PDF Form Field
retrieve-character-limit-of-pdf-form-fie.description: Shows how to load a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf and obtain the maximum character count allowed for the "Address" field using Form.GetFieldLimit.

delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific form field ("OldPhoneNumber") from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated file.

remove-typewriter-forms-from-page.title: Remove Typewriter Form XObjects from a Specific PDF Page
remove-typewriter-forms-from-page.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Typewriter form XObjects (Subtype "Form") on page three of a PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber.

clear-page5-form-fields.title: Delete Form Fields on Page Five
clear-page5-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF's form fields, find those located on page 5, and delete them to clear that page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-acroform-data-to-xml.title: Export AcroForm Data to XML
export-acroform-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to bind a PDF containing an AcroForm and export all form field values to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

import-acroform-data-from-xml.title: Import AcroForm Data from XML into PDF
import-acroform-data-from-xml.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, import AcroForm field values from an XML file, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-submit-button.title: Create a PDF Submit Button that Posts to a URL
create-pdf-submit-button.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button form field to an existing PDF and attach a SubmitFormAction that posts the form data to a specified web endpoint.

configure-submit-button-url.title: Configure Submit Button URL in PDF Form
configure-submit-button-url.description: Shows how to set a PDF form's submit button action to a specific URL programmatically using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

validate-maxlen-truncation-pdf-textbox.title: Validate MaxLen Truncation in PDF TextBox Field
validate-maxlen-truncation-pdf-textbox.description: Demonstrates how setting MaxLen on a TextBoxField limits input to 50 characters, causing excess characters to be truncated when the PDF is saved and reloaded.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-text-field.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Text Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom font and size for every text field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

set-comments-field-max-length.title: Set Maximum Length for Comments Field in PDFs
set-comments-field-max-length.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files, locate a TextBox field named 'Comments', and restrict its input to 100 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-csv-report-pdf-form-fields.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Form Fields
generate-csv-report-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads one or more PDF files, iterates through their form fields, and creates a CSV report listing each field's name, type, and character limit.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF on Network Share
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF containing AcroForm fields and exporting the form data to an XFDF (XML) file saved to a UNC network share.

import-xml-form-data-into-multiple-pdfs.title: Import XML Form Data into Multiple PDFs
import-xml-form-data-into-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to import XML form field values into several PDF documents simultaneously using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

flatten-first-page-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten First Page to Remove Form Fields
flatten-first-page-remove-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten the first page to delete all form fields, and save the cleaned page as a template.

add-payment-method-radio-button-group.title: Add PaymentMethod Radio Button Group to PDF
add-payment-method-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a radio button group named 'PaymentMethod' containing 'Credit' and 'Debit' options using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-radio-button-value.title: Set Default Radio Button Value in PDF Form
set-default-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the selected option of a radio button group in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example loads a PDF, sets the "PaymentMethod" field to "Credit", and saves the result.

add-multiline-feedback-textbox.title: Add Multiline Feedback TextBox to PDF
add-multiline-feedback-textbox.description: Shows how to insert a multiline TextBox form field named 'Feedback' with a 500‑character limit into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-form-fields.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
remove-signature-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate over a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type SignatureField, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v3.description: Loads a PDF document, reads all form fields and their current values, and writes them to a CSV file for external processing.

import-csv-data-into-pdf-form-fields.title: Import CSV Data into PDF Form Fields
import-csv-data-into-pdf-form-fields.description: The example reads a CSV file, maps column headers to values, and fills matching fields in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates loading a PDF, disabling auto‑recalculation, setting field values, and saving the result.

add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field-to-p.title: Add Hidden Creation Timestamp Field to PDF
add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field-to-p.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden, read‑only text box form field containing the document's creation timestamp into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-employeeid-field-readonly.title: Set EmployeeID Form Field to Read‑Only in PDF
set-employeeid-field-readonly.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'EmployeeID' form field, mark it as read‑only to prevent user edits, and save the updated document.

flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening all interactive form fields so they become static, and saving the resulting document.

copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.title: Copy Form Fields Between PDFs Using FormEditor
copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.description: Shows how to bind a destination PDF with FormEditor, enumerate form fields from a source PDF using Form, copy each field to the destination PDF, and save the result.

create-country-dropdown-list.title: Create Country Dropdown List in PDF Form
create-country-dropdown-list.description: Demonstrates how to add a ComboBox (dropdown) field named 'Country' to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and populate it with a predefined list of country names.

set-default-selected-item-combo-box.title: Set Default Selected Item in Combo Box Using FormEditor
set-default-selected-item-combo-box.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor to locate a combo box field named "Country" and set its default selected option to "United States".

validate-numeric-textboxfield-input.title: Validate Numeric TextBoxField Input in PDF
validate-numeric-textboxfield-input.description: Creates a PDF with a TextBoxField intended for numeric input and demonstrates programmatic validation that rejects alphabetic characters by throwing an exception.

add-js-calculation-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add JavaScript Calculation Button to PDF Form
add-js-calculation-button-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form with Quantity, UnitPrice, and Total fields and a push button that runs JavaScript to calculate the total price.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to iterate through all form fields in a PDF and clear any attached JavaScript actions, securing the document before distribution.

export-pdf-form-field-appearances.title: Export PDF Form Field Appearances to JSON Files
export-pdf-form-field-appearances.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and exports each field's definition and appearance streams to separate JSON files for visual inspection.

add-custom-image-to-pdf-button.title: Add Custom Image Appearance to PDF Button Field
add-custom-image-to-pdf-button.description: Demonstrates how to import an image file and set it as the appearance stream of a button field in a PDF form, using both the core ButtonField API and the XFA API.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml-form-data.title: Batch Convert PDFs to XML Form Data
batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml-form-data.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files and convert each PDF to an XML form data file using Aspose.Pdf's Document and XmlSaveOptions, keeping the original file names.

synchronize-form-data-between-pdfs.title: Synchronize Form Data Between PDFs Using XFDF
synchronize-form-data-between-pdfs.description: Exports form field values from a source PDF to an XFDF file and imports them into a target PDF, creating a filled copy of the target document.

replace-xfa-with-acroform.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using an XML Template
replace-xfa-with-acroform.description: Demonstrates how to detect an XFA form in a PDF, import field definitions from an XML template, create corresponding AcroForm fields, and save the document as a standard AcroForm PDF.

set-tooltip-email-form-field.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
set-tooltip-email-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'Email' form field, assign a tooltip via the AlternateName property, and save the modified document.

set-red-border-color-for-pdf-text-fields.title: Set Red Border Color for PDF Text Fields
set-red-border-color-for-pdf-text-fields.description: Shows how to loop through PDF form fields and change a text box's border (via the field's Color property) to red, highlighting mandatory information using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.title: Add Signature Field with Image Stamp to PDF
add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature form field named 'ClientSignature' in an existing PDF and set its visual appearance using a predefined image stamp.

sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.title: Sign and Lock a PDF Signature Field
sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.description: Shows how to apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF signature field and then set the field to read‑only so it cannot be altered during review.

hidden-calculation-field-with-javascript.title: Create Hidden Calculation Field with JavaScript in PDF
hidden-calculation-field-with-javascript.description: Demonstrates adding a hidden numeric field to a PDF that automatically calculates the sum of two other fields using JavaScript.

export-selected-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Selected Form Fields to XML
export-selected-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to export only specific PDF form fields to an XML file by exporting the complete form data with Aspose.Pdf and then filtering the XML for the required field names.

import-xml-update-pdf-form-fields.title: Import XML Subset and Update PDF Form Fields
import-xml-update-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, read an XML file containing a subset of field values, update matching PDF form fields, and save the filled PDF.

add-date-field-with-validation.title: Add Date Field with MM/DD/YYYY Validation
add-date-field-with-validation.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a DateField, set its display format, and attach a JavaScript OnValidate action that enforces the MM/DD/YYYY pattern using a regular expression.

set-max-length-pdf-password-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Field
set-max-length-pdf-password-field.description: Shows how to add a text box form field to a PDF and enforce a maximum input length of 20 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-template-fill-from-json.title: Create PDF Form Template and Fill from JSON
create-pdf-form-template-fill-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF form with placeholder fields using Aspose.Pdf and then populate those fields from a JSON data source.

batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Form Templates from CSV Data
batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.description: Shows how to read CSV rows into a DataTable, map each column to matching PDF form fields, fill the template for each record, and save the resulting PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

handle-missing-xml-import-for-pdf-form.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form with Missing File Handling
handle-missing-xml-import-for-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to safely import XML data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf while handling the case where the XML file is missing, preventing runtime exceptions.

toggle-pdf-form-field-visibility.title: Toggle PDF Form Field Visibility with JavaScript
toggle-pdf-form-field-visibility.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a checkbox field to hide or show another form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-unique-form-f.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Unique Form Fields
create-multi-page-pdf-with-unique-form-f.description: Demonstrates how to add the same set of form fields to each page of a PDF and assign unique names to the fields using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure JSON export options, and export all form field definitions to a JSON file for use with external form builders.

import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a JSON schema that defines AcroForm fields and import them into a newly created PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-checkbox-default-checked.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
set-checkbox-default-checked.description: Demonstrates how to create a checkbox form field in a PDF and set its default value to checked programmatically using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-with-submit-button.title: Create PDF Form with Submit Button to REST Endpoint
create-pdf-form-with-submit-button.description: Shows how to generate a PDF form, add a text field and a submit button that automatically posts the form data to a REST endpoint using Aspose.Pdf.

configure-pdf-submit-button-post.title: Configure PDF Submit Button for HTTP POST with URL‑Encoded Data
configure-pdf-submit-button-post.description: Demonstrates adding a submit button to a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and configuring it to send URL‑encoded form data via HTTP POST.

test-submit-form-action-returns-200-ok.title: Test SubmitFormAction Returns 200 OK
test-submit-form-action-returns-200-ok.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a submit button using Aspose.Pdf and verify via a unit test that the configured submit URL responds with HTTP 200 using a simulated POST request.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to insert a reset button into an existing PDF form that clears all user‑entered data using JavaScript.

set-export-value-for-pdf-radio-button.title: Set Export Value for PDF Radio Button Option
set-export-value-for-pdf-radio-button.description: Shows how to add or update a radio button option in a PDF form and assign a custom export value using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.title: Create PDF with Hidden GUID Tracking Field
create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.description: Demonstrates generating a GUID at runtime and storing it in a hidden textbox form field inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

transform-pdf-form-data-schema.title: Transform PDF Form Data Between JSON Schemas
transform-pdf-form-data-schema.description: The example extracts form fields from a source PDF to JSON, renames the fields, and imports the transformed data into another PDF, creating sample PDFs if they are missing.

set-pdf-viewer-zoom-using-formeditor.title: Set PDF Viewer Zoom Level Using FormEditor
set-pdf-viewer-zoom-using-formeditor.description: Shows how to define an initial zoom level for a PDF by creating a destination and assigning it to the document's OpenAction through the FormEditor facade.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Submit Button
add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.description: Shows how to create a push button on a PDF page and assign a tooltip (using the AlternateName property) with Aspose.Pdf.

lock-pdf-form-fields.title: Lock PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only) with Aspose.Pdf
lock-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to set each form field in a PDF to read‑only using Aspose.Pdf and then save the locked document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document, add a read‑only barcode field using Aspose.Pdf, and save the form to a file.

set-file-size-limit-for-pdf-attachments.title: Set File Size Limit for PDF Attachment Fields
set-file-size-limit-for-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to restrict the maximum file size for attachment fields to 2 MB by configuring Aspose.Pdf's global file‑size limit before loading and saving a PDF document.

export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Field Metadata to CSV
export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates over its form fields, extracts properties like name, type, default value, read‑only and required flags, and writes the information to a CSV file for auditing.

import-form-fields-from-csv.title: Import Form Fields from CSV into PDF
import-form-fields-from-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading field definitions from a CSV file, creating corresponding form fields, and saving the updated document.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Date Picker Field with Current Date to PDF
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to insert a DateField into an existing PDF and set its default value to the current system date when the document is opened.

validate-date-field-before-2000.title: Validate Date Field to Disallow Dates Before 2000
validate-date-field-before-2000.description: Demonstrates adding a DateField to a PDF and attaching JavaScript that prevents users from entering dates earlier than January 1, 2000.

create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.title: Create a Dynamic List Box in a PDF Form
create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a ListBox field to a PDF document, populate it with items, enable multi‑selection, and save the form using Aspose.Pdf.

set-text-field-background-color-light-gr.title: Set Text Field Background Color to Light Gray
set-text-field-background-color-light-gr.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, and change its background (fill) color to light gray using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate and Rename PDF Form Field
duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically copy an existing form field, assign new names, reposition each copy, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.title: Add JavaScript Email Validation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf to ensure the entered email contains an '@' character.

create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.title: Create PDF Tax Calculation Form
create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.description: Shows how to build a PDF form with Subtotal, Tax Rate, and a calculated Tax Amount field using Aspose.Pdf, and attach JavaScript to automatically compute the tax.

export-tax-value-to-xml.title: Export Calculated Tax Value to XML from PDF Form
export-tax-value-to-xml.description: Demonstrates extracting a calculated tax field value from a submitted PDF form and saving it as a custom XML file, with optional export of the full PDF model to XML.

import-tax-rate-xml-pdf.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into PDF Hidden Form Field
import-tax-rate-xml-pdf.description: Shows how to read a tax rate from an XML file and populate a hidden form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-noexport-flag-on-sensitive-pdf-form-.title: Set NoExport Flag on Sensitive PDF Form Fields
set-noexport-flag-on-sensitive-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to mark specific PDF form fields as non‑exportable (NoExport) using Aspose.Pdf, preventing sensitive data like SSN or credit card numbers from being included in exported data.

batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdfs.title: Batch Apply Custom Font to PDFs
batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a network folder, load a custom TrueType font with fallback handling, replace the font of all text fragments using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated documents to a resolved output folder.

highlight-required-pdf-form-field.title: Highlight Required PDF Form Field with Red Border
highlight-required-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required and visually highlight it with a red border using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code Field from Text Field in PDF
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF text field so that a QR code barcode field updates automatically when the text changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-form-data-xml-xslt-report.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Generate Custom Report with XSLT
export-form-data-xml-xslt-report.description: Shows how to export PDF form fields to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then transform that XML with XSLT to produce a custom HTML report.

import-xml-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form Fields
import-xml-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, assign XFA data from an XML file to repopulate its form fields, and save the updated document.

create-pdf-multi-select-listbox.title: Create PDF with Multi‑Select List Box
create-pdf-multi-select-listbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box form field that allows multiple selections to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

list-box-three-selection-limit.title: Create Multi-Select List Box with Three Pre-Selected Items
list-box-three-selection-limit.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi-select list box to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, populate it with options, and pre-select three items to illustrate a three-item selection limit.

add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden IP Address Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a hidden text box field to a PDF and populate it with the user's IP address using JavaScript that runs when the document is opened.

add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.title: Add IPv4 Validation to PDF Text Box Field
add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.description: Creates a PDF with a text box form field for an IPv4 address and attaches JavaScript that validates the input using a regular expression, rejecting invalid formats.

add-required-signature-and-lock-pdf.title: Add Required Signature Field and Lock PDF after Signing
add-required-signature-and-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a required digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a certificate, and apply an MDP lock to prevent any further changes.

export-pdf-signature-details-to-xml.title: Export PDF Signature Details to XML Audit Log
export-pdf-signature-details-to-xml.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts information from each signature field—including date, reason, algorithm details, and certificate—and writes the data to an XML file for audit purposes.

import-xml-signature-data-and-sign-pdf-f.title: Import XML Signature Data and Sign PDF Field
import-xml-signature-data-and-sign-pdf-f.description: The example loads a PDF containing a signature field, imports XFA data from an XML file, creates a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, and applies the signature to the field.

set-pdf-form-field-password.title: Set Password for PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
set-pdf-form-field-password.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a password box form field, assign a password value, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

validate-pdf-form-password-protection.title: Validate Password Protection on PDF Form
validate-pdf-form-password-protection.description: The example tries to open a password‑protected PDF with an incorrect password to confirm access is denied, then opens it with the correct password and reads a protected form field.

create-pdf-form-automatic-backup.title: Create PDF Form with Automatic Backup on Field Change
create-pdf-form-automatic-backup.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form, add a text field, and attach JavaScript that saves a backup copy each time the field value changes.

add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Add JavaScript Listener to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that triggers when the field's value changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-form-field-appearance-to-json.title: Export Form Field Appearance Settings to JSON
export-form-field-appearance-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields, including their appearance settings, from a PDF document to a formatted JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-appearance-from-json.title: Import Form Field Appearance from JSON into PDF
import-form-appearance-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field appearance settings from a JSON file using ImportFromJson, and save the updated document.

create-pdf-form-collapsible-section.title: Create PDF Form with Collapsible Section Using Checkbox
create-pdf-form-collapsible-section.description: Demonstrates adding a checkbox to a PDF form and using JavaScript to show or hide a collapsible text field based on the checkbox state.

collapse-pdf-outline-section.title: Collapse PDF Outline Section
collapse-pdf-outline-section.description: Demonstrates how to collapse a top‑level outline (bookmark) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting the Open property of the outline item to false.

add-calculated-total-price-field.title: Add Calculated Total Price Field to PDF Form
add-calculated-total-price-field.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric fields to a PDF form and use JavaScript to automatically calculate a total price from quantity and unit price, with auto‑recalculation enabled.

export-total-price-to-xml.title: Export Total Price to XML for Invoicing
export-total-price-to-xml.description: Calculates the sum of item prices and writes the total to an XML file representing an invoice for external integration.

generate-pdf-discounted-price-from-xml.title: Generate PDF with Discounted Price from XML
generate-pdf-discounted-price-from-xml.description: Reads discount rates from an XML file, aggregates them, applies the total discount to a base price, and writes the calculation result into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-file-size.title: Validate PDF File Size Before Form Submission
validate-pdf-file-size.description: Shows how to restrict an uploaded PDF to a maximum of 5 MB using Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property and handle size‑limit exceptions to block form submission.

add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar to PDF Form Using Aspose.Pdf
add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form with a progress bar that updates automatically as the user checks sections, using Aspose.Pdf fields and JavaScript actions.

pdf-form-language-specific-label.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Specific Dynamic Label
pdf-form-language-specific-label.description: The example creates a PDF document containing a combo box for language selection and a text box whose label updates dynamically via JavaScript based on the chosen locale.

locale-aware-label-with-javascript.title: Add Locale-Aware Label with JavaScript to PDF
locale-aware-label-with-javascript.description: Creates a PDF containing a text box form field and embeds JavaScript that selects a label based on the viewer's language using a dictionary of translations.

batch-generate-pdf-forms-from-csv.title: Batch Generate PDF Forms from CSV Data
batch-generate-pdf-forms-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file into a DataTable and use Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to create a filled PDF form for each record in the data set.

add-submit-button-with-validation.title: Add Submit Button with JavaScript Validation to PDF
add-submit-button-with-validation.description: Demonstrates how to add a submit button to a PDF form and attach JavaScript that checks required fields before allowing submission.

create-pdf-form-with-hidden-log.title: Create PDF Form with Hidden Interaction Log
create-pdf-form-with-hidden-log.description: Shows how to add a visible text box and a hidden log field to a PDF and use JavaScript to record when the field is activated.

export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Interaction Log to XML
export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf, bind the Form facade, and export the user interaction data to an XML (XFDF) file.

import-interaction-log-xml-xfdf.title: Import XML Interaction Log and XFDF Annotations to Reconstruct PDF
import-interaction-log-xml-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML interaction log into a PDF document, optionally importing XFDF annotations, and saving the reconstructed PDF for viewer testing.

add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Updating Date/Time Field to PDF
add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates inserting a DateField into a PDF and attaching JavaScript so the field displays the current date and time each time the page is opened.

create-readonly-date-field-pdf.title: Create a Read‑Only Date Field in a PDF Form
create-readonly-date-field-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a date field to a PDF, set its value and display format, and make it read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

conditional-section-pdf-form.title: Create PDF Form with Conditional Section Using Checkbox
conditional-section-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a text field in a PDF form using JavaScript actions with Aspose.Pdf.

export-conditional-visibility-state-to-x.title: Export Conditional Visibility State of PDF Form Fields to XML
export-conditional-visibility-state-to-x.description: Shows how to toggle a widget annotation's Exportable property and save the PDF document model, including visibility settings, to an XML file to preserve user preferences across sessions.

import-xfdf-visibility-states.title: Import XFDF Visibility States into PDF
import-xfdf-visibility-states.description: Loads a PDF, reads an XFDF file containing form field visibility flags, applies those states to the PDF form fields, and saves the updated document.

create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.title: Create PDF Form with Concatenated Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.description: Shows how to add text fields to a PDF form and generate a Code128 barcode from the concatenated values of those fields using Aspose.Pdf.

set-barcode-code128-link-source-field.title: Set Barcode Field to Code128 and Link to Source Field
set-barcode-code128-link-source-field.description: Demonstrates how to create or retrieve a barcode form field, set its format to Code128, and keep it synchronized with a text field using JavaScript in an Aspose.Pdf document.

export-pdf-barcode-values-to-xml.title: Export PDF Barcode Field Values to XML
export-pdf-barcode-values-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its barcode form fields, and write each field's name and value to an XML file for inventory system integration.
